controller_rule.exception: switch away from the base winner when another obligation trades exactly one unit of immediate gain for at least +2 child_best_gain, +1 child_best_cut, and +1 next_uncovered

discovery_domain: lookahead-dominance controller distilled from bounded policy-improvement failures
strongest_claim: The exact 4x4 motif exception compresses further into a generic lookahead-dominance controller. That controller is exact on exhaustive 4x4 roots and reachable states, and it improves the flat base controller on sampled 5x5 and 6x6 roots.
